# Next Phase Sports — Full Content Index

> AI-powered autonomous sports facility management platform.

## About Next Phase Sports

Next Phase Sports is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for sports facility operators. It automates the full operations lifecycle of a sports facility: from online booking and membership management to league administration, AI-driven scheduling, and smart access control. Operators can run their facility with minimal manual intervention.

## Core Feature Areas

### Booking & Scheduling
- Real-time court/field/facility availability calendar
- Self-service online booking for walk-ins, members, and league players
- AI auto-fill: automatically offers open slots to waitlisted players
- Recurring booking support for training groups and regular players
- Conflict resolution: AI detects and resolves double-bookings automatically

### League & Tournament Management
- League creation with season scheduling, standings, and stats tracking
- Tournament bracket generation (single elimination, double elimination, round robin)
- Team and player registration with online payment
- Game result reporting and automatic standings updates
- Referee and staff assignment tools

### Membership Management
- Tiered membership plans (monthly, annual, punch passes)
- Stripe Connect billing with automatic renewal
- Member portal: book courts, view history, manage account
- Smart lock integration via Kisi — members unlock facilities via mobile app
- Access log tracking per member

### AI & Automation
- Autonomous scheduling assistant (Claude API via Vercel AI SDK)
- Smart notification engine: SMS (Twilio) and email (Resend) for reminders, cancellations, and win-back
- Automated dunning sequences for failed payments
- Customer service AI for handling common inquiries
- Utilization analytics and revenue optimization recommendations

### Admin Dashboard
- Facility performance metrics (utilization rate, revenue per court, peak hours)
- Staff management and role-based access (Clerk multi-tenant auth)
- Payout management via Stripe Connect
- Reporting: revenue, bookings, membership churn, and league activity

## Platform Details

- Tech: Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL (Railway), Clerk, Stripe Connect, Twilio, Resend, Inngest, Kisi
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend) + Railway (database)
- Mobile: Fully responsive, mobile-optimized for facility check-ins

## Key Links

- [Home](https://nextphasesports.com/): Platform overview
- [Pricing](https://nextphasesports.com/pricing): Subscription plans for facility operators
- [Book a Demo](https://nextphasesports.com/demo): Schedule a product walkthrough
- [Sign Up](https://nextphasesports.com/signup): Start your free trial

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What types of sports facilities use Next Phase Sports?**
Indoor tennis courts, pickleball courts, basketball courts, soccer fields, ice rinks, fitness gyms, and multi-sport complexes.

**Does Next Phase Sports handle online payments?**
Yes. The platform uses Stripe Connect so facilities can accept bookings, membership fees, and tournament registrations with direct payouts to their account.

**Can members book courts from their phone?**
Yes. The member portal is fully mobile-optimized. Members can view availability, book courts, pay, and unlock the facility via the Kisi smart lock integration — all from their phone.

**How does the AI scheduling work?**
The AI scheduling assistant monitors facility utilization in real-time. When a court goes unbooked within a configurable window, it automatically contacts waitlisted members and players with availability offers, fills the slot, and confirms the booking without staff involvement.

**Does it support multi-location facilities?**
Yes. The platform is built multi-tenant and supports chains with multiple locations under one account, with per-location reporting and consolidated billing.
